content.full_text:
Fatn Por-rrrcel PnacrrcEs CorraMrssroN
428 J Street. Suite 620. Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660. Fax (916) 322-0886
December 19,2002
Jay Morse
33 Carillo Drive
San Rafael, CA 94903
Re
Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-02-159
Dear Mr. Morse:
. Thi.s letter is to notiff you that we have withdrawn the above captioned request
for advice relating to the revolving door issues of the Political Reform Act.r In July of
2002, we discussed your issues at length and I referred you to certain regulations that you
accessed on the FPPC website. At that time, I informed you that your request did not
contain specific questions. You stated that you would amend your request and resubmit.
I telephoned you in August 2002, inquiring as to the status of your request. You
informed me that you would forward your amended letter after August 15,2002. As we
have not received the required information, we are withdrawing your request for advice.
If you would still like written advice on these questions, you may send in another
inquiry containing the requested information. Should you have any questions, please call
me at (916) 322-5660.
Sincerely
Luisa Menchaca
Counsel, Legal
JSje
I:\Advice Ltrs\02159
t Government Code sections 81000-9114. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections lSl}g-l}gg7
of the California Code of Regulations.
k€i,

sections.question_synthetic: The requestor sought advice regarding revolving door issues under the Political Reform Act, but did not initially provide specific questions.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC withdrew the request for advice because the requestor failed to provide specific questions and did not resubmit an amended request with the required information after being given the opportunity to do so.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is a withdrawal letter. No Q/C sections present. The document clearly states the request was withdrawn due to lack of specific questions and failure to resubmit amended request. FPPC counsel Luisa Menchaca invites resubmission with required information.

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: The requestor sought advice regarding revolving door issues under the Political Reform Act, but did not initially provide specific questions.

CONCLUSION: The FPPC withdrew the request for advice because the requestor failed to provide specific questions and did not resubmit an amended request with the required information after being given the opportunity to do so.

embedding.summary: The FPPC withdrew Jay Morse's request for advice (W-02-159) regarding Political Reform Act revolving door issues because the request lacked specific questions and the requestor did not resubmit an amended version as promised.
